# Le Marina Bay 409

> Luxury 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom vacation rental on the Intracoastal Waterway in Sunny Isles Beach, Florida. 116 m², private balcony with direct waterfront views, an outdoor pool and hot tub, and a 5-minute walk to the beach. Airbnb Superhost rated 4.9 out of 5 stars across 48 reviews. Sleeps up to 6 guests.

## Property
- Address: 18100 N Bay Rd, Sunny Isles Beach, FL 33160, United States (coordinates 25.9444644, -80.1245419)
- Location: Sunny Isles Beach, Florida, USA — on the Intracoastal Waterway, a barrier island between Miami and Fort Lauderdale
- Size: 116 m² (about 1,249 sq ft)
- Layout: 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, up to 6 guests
- Master bedroom: 1 king bed, en-suite bathroom, private balcony access with intracoastal views
- Second bedroom: 1 queen bed plus 1 single bed
- Living area: open-plan living room with a sectional and Smart TV; fully equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances and granite countertops
- Outdoor: private balcony, outdoor pool and hot tub on the waterfront

## Amenities
- Direct Intracoastal Waterway views
- Private balcony
- Outdoor pool and hot tub
- Fully equipped kitchen
- Smart TV
- En-suite bathroom in the master bedroom

## Location and distances
- Sunny Isles Beach: 5-minute walk
- Aventura Mall: 10-minute drive
- Hard Rock Casino: 15-minute drive
- Fort Lauderdale Airport (FLL): 25-minute drive
- Miami / Wynwood: 30-minute drive

## Reviews
- Airbnb Superhost
- 4.9 out of 5 stars across 48 verified reviews
- International guests from Argentina, the United Kingdom, and France

## Booking
- Book on Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.es/rooms/51705710
